name: Integrity Mold Inspection
description: Family-owned and operated mold inspection team in Palm Beach, Florida, specializing in assessments and protocols with decades of experience. Performs only inspections, no remediation.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Working with Integrity was the easiest part!
We felt that we were in very capable hands.
Integrity Mold Inspection lives up to their name.
He explained everything he was doing and why.

sentiment.summary: Integrity Mold Inspection has an excellent reputation, with consistently positive reviews praising their professionalism, thoroughness, responsiveness, and ability to make a stressful process manageable.

name: Mold Inspection & Testing
description: Provides unbiased mold testing and inspection services for indoor air quality, available 7 days a week. National network with reputation for honesty and efficiency since 1997.
